prestazioni: Engine swap to Hyundai-Kia G380T (Theta III 3.8L V6) with forged internals (Manley H-beam connecting rods, JE 10.5:1 forged pistons) and a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (1.35 A/R turbine housing) pushing 28 psi of boost, paired with a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate and a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe by Armytrix

Full drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (85% lockup) in the rear, Cusco Type-RS front LSD, and a PRL Motorsports Stage 3 transmission adapter plate with a Tilton 7.25-inch twin-disc carbon clutch and billet flywheel for the G380T swap

Custom ECU calibration by Syvecs S12 standalone ECU with launch control, flat-foot shifting, and a 4D traction control map optimized for Yokohama Advan A052 semi-slick tires (265/35R19 front, 295/30R19 rear) on TE37VOLK Racing wheels (9.5x19 +15 front, 11x19 +15 rear)
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody conversion kit (GV60-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, custom front splitter, and a 3D-printed rear diffuser with integrated exhaust exits for the Armytrix setup

Full carbon fiber interior gut: Recaro SP-G TS II seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (T45 steel, 4-point with integrated fire suppression system), and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub

Aerodynamic enhancements: APR Performance GT500-style carbon fiber rear wing (3D-scanned for GV60 roofline) with Gurney flap, custom hood vents for the G380T intercooler setup, and a HKS Hi-Power titanium exhaust system with quad 100mm outlets exiting through the diffuser
